MarkTheRipper [0.3.20, net6.0]
Fantastic faster generates static site comes from simply Markdowns.
Copyright (c) Kouji Matsui.
https://github.com/kekyo/MarkTheRipper

usage: mtr.exe [options] init [<sample name>]
  <sample name>: "minimum", "sidebar", "standard" and "rich"
usage: mtr.exe [options] new [<category path> [<slug>]]
usage: mtr.exe [options] [build]

      --no-cleanup           Do not cleanup before processing if exists
  -n, --no-open              Do not open editor/browser automatically
  -h, --help                 Print this help
